jobs.description: Join Foyer Group as a holiday worker and gain hands-on experience in a dynamic corporate environment. You will support administrative teams with data entry, document preparation, and internal coordination. Responsibilities may include assisting with customer service inquiries, organizing files, and supporting ongoing projects. This role is ideal for students looking to gain professional exposure during school holidays. Candidates should be detail-oriented, reliable, and eager to learn. Basic knowledge of office tools such as Microsoft Office is beneficial. You will work in a collaborative environment and gain insight into business operations.
responsibilities: Assist administrative teams with daily tasks

jobs.description: As a Marketing Intern at Amazon, you will support the Product & Growth team in executing marketing campaigns across European markets. Responsibilities include analyzing campaign performance, assisting with content creation, and contributing to marketing strategies. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams such as design, analytics, and product. Ideal candidates are pursuing a degree in marketing, business, or communications and possess strong analytical and creative skills. Experience with digital marketing tools is a plus. This internship offers exposure to large-scale, data-driven marketing operations.
requirements: Student in marketing, business, or communications

jobs.description: The Operations Internship at Goldman Sachs provides an opportunity to understand the backbone of financial services. You will assist with trade processing, client onboarding, and risk management activities. Responsibilities include monitoring transactions, identifying inefficiencies, and supporting process improvements. Candidates should demonstrate strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and interest in finance. Students in finance, economics, or related fields are encouraged to apply. This role provides valuable exposure to global financial systems and professional development opportunities.

As a Student Marketeer for Red Bull, you will represent the brand on campus and engage with student communities. Responsibilities include organizing promotional events, distributing products, and increasing brand awareness. You will gather feedback and contribute to local marketing strategies. This role is ideal for outgoing and energetic individuals with strong communication skills. Creativity and initiative are essential. You will gain experience in event marketing, brand promotion, and community engagement.

As a Legal Intern at DLA Piper, you will assist lawyers with legal research, document drafting, and case preparation. You will gain exposure to corporate law, regulatory compliance, and client advisory services. Responsibilities include reviewing legal documents, conducting research, and supporting ongoing cases. Candidates should be law students with strong analytical and research skills. Attention to detail and ability to work in a fast-paced environment are essential. This internship offers valuable insight into international legal practice.

The Business Acceptance Internship at UBS focuses on client onboarding and risk assessment processes. You will assist with reviewing client documentation, performing compliance checks, and supporting onboarding workflows. Responsibilities include analyzing risk profiles, ensuring regulatory compliance, and collaborating with internal teams. Ideal candidates are studying finance, law, or business. Strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and understanding of financial regulations are beneficial. This role offers experience in compliance and financial operations.
requirements: Student in finance, law, or business

jobs.description: As a Digital Marketing Trainee at Advanzia Bank, you will support online marketing initiatives and campaign execution. Responsibilities include content creation, social media management, and performance analysis. You will assist with SEO optimization, email marketing, and campaign reporting. Candidates should be creative, data-driven, and interested in digital marketing. Knowledge of marketing tools and analytics platforms is a plus. This role provides practical experience in digital marketing within the banking sector.

Work at Luxembourg Airport as an InfoDesk Support assistant and help passengers navigate airport services. Responsibilities include answering questions, providing directions, and assisting with general inquiries. You will support daily airport operations and ensure a positive passenger experience. Candidates should have strong communication skills, be friendly, and able to work in a fast-paced environment. Multilingual skills are an advantage. This role offers valuable customer service experience.

As an Event Programming Assistant Intern at Paperjam, you will support the planning and execution of business events. Responsibilities include coordinating schedules, managing logistics, and assisting with event promotion. You will work closely with the events team to ensure successful event delivery. Candidates should be organized, detail-oriented, and interested in event management. Strong communication skills are essential. This internship provides hands-on experience in event coordination and business networking.

Join FANUC Europe as a Working Student in HR & Change Management and contribute to organizational initiatives. Responsibilities include supporting HR projects, assisting with internal communications, and participating in change management processes. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams and gain insight into HR strategies. Candidates should be studying human resources, business, or psychology. Strong organizational and communication skills are required. This role offers valuable experience in HR and organizational development.
